name: io.github.chrischall/flightaware-mcp
description: Live flight tracking and aviation data via FlightAware AeroAPI (flights, airports, alerts).

environmentVariables.name: AEROAPI_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Default directory for flight-map PNGs (default: current working directory)

environmentVariables.name: AEROAPI_CACHE_TTL
environmentVariables.description: Seconds to cache identical live-data GET responses (default 15; 0 disables)

environmentVariables.name: AEROAPI_STATIC_CACHE_TTL
environmentVariables.description: Seconds to cache reference data — airports, operators, routes, ownership (default 3600; 0 disables)
